    A

    add(T) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.KeyMap
     
    add(T, float) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This method adds a new element to this Set with the given weight.

    B

    BlockPosition - Class in dev.yanianz.star.blocks
    This is the position of a block in a World.
    BlockPosition(Block) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This creates a new BlockPosition for the given Blocks position.
    BlockPosition(Location) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This creates a new BlockPosition for the given Location
    BlockPosition(World, int, int, int) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This creates a new BlockPosition for the given position.
    BlockPosition(World, long) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This creates a new BlockPosition from the given position and World.

    C

    ChunkPosition - Class in dev.yanianz.star.blocks
    This is a memory efficient version of a Chunk.

    This method clears this Set and removes all elements from it.

    OptionalMap.get(Object) should be preferred.

    CopyUtils - Class in dev.yanianz.star.collections
    Utilities for deep-copying collections, maps and arrays

    D

    deepCopy(Collection, UnaryOperator, Collection) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given Collection to another.
    deepCopy(Collection, UnaryOperator, IntFunction) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given Collection to another.
    deepCopy(Map, UnaryOperator) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep-clone transformation on all values in a given Map
    deepCopy(Map, UnaryOperator, Supplier) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given Map to another.
    deepCopy(Map, UnaryOperator, Map) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given Map to another.
    deepCopy(T[], UnaryOperator, IntFunction) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given array to another.
    deepCopy(T[], UnaryOperator, T[]) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.CopyUtils
    Perform a deep copy of all the elements from a given array to another.
    dev.yanianz.star.blocks - package dev.yanianz.star.blocks
    This package provides some utilities for the handling of Blocks.
    dev.yanianz.star.collections - package dev.yanianz.star.collections
    This package provides some utilities related to Collections.
    dev.yanianz.star.data - package dev.yanianz.star.data
    This package contains some data-related classes.
    dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent - package dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent
    This package provides some utilities like the PersistentDataAPI, this api allows you to interact with PersistentDataContainers.
    Dirtyable - Interface in dev.yanianz.star.data
    This interface can be implemented to mark an object as dirty-able.

    F

    find(Predicate) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.LoopIterator
    This method loops this LoopIterator until a matching item has been found.
    find(Block, int) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.Vein
    This method gives you a List of all Blocks that are directly or indirectly connected to the given Block and share the same Material as the given Block.
    find(Block, int, Predicate) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.Vein
    This method gives you a List of all Blocks that are directly or indirectly connected to the given Block and pass the given Predicate.
    forEach(BiConsumer) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.OptionalMap

    G

    get() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.TriStateOptional
     
    get(K) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.OptionalMap
    This method gives you an Optional describing the value mapped to the given key.
    get(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey, PersistentDataType) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get an object based on the provided PersistentDataType in a PersistentDataContainer, if the key doesn't exist it returns null.
    get(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey, PersistentDataType, Z) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get an object based on the provided PersistentDataType in a PersistentDataContainer or the default value if the key doesn't exist.
    getAsLong(int, int) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.ChunkPosition
    This compacts the two provided integers into one Long.
    getAsLong(int, int, int) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This compacts the three provided integers into one Long.
    getAsLong(Location) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    This compacts the three provided integers into one Long.
    getAsOptional() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.TriStateOptional
     
    getBlock() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    Gets the Block at this position.
    getBoolean(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get a byte value in a PersistentDataContainer or the default value passed if no key exists.
    getByte(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get a byte value in a PersistentDataContainer, if the key doesn't exist it returns -1.
    getByte(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey, byte) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get a byte value in a PersistentDataContainer or the default value passed if no key exists.
    getByteArray(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get a byte array in a PersistentDataContainer, if the key doesn't exist it returns null.
    getByteArray(PersistentDataHolder, NamespacedKey, byte...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent.PersistentDataAPI
    Get a byte array in a PersistentDataContainer or the default value passed if no key exists.
    getChunk() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    Gets the Chunk where this block is located.
    getChunk() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.ChunkPosition
    Gets the Chunk where this block is located.
    getChunkX() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    Gets the chunks x coordinate for this block.
    getChunkZ() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.blocks.BlockPosition
    Gets the chunks z coordinate for this block.

    Get a nested PersistentDataContainer or the default value passed if no key exists.

    L

    LoopIterator<T> - Class in dev.yanianz.star.collections
    This is an infite implementation of Iterator.
    LoopIterator(Streamable) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.LoopIterator
    This will create a new instance of LoopIterator that will operate on the elements of the given Streamable
    LoopIterator(Collection) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.LoopIterator
    This will create a new instance of LoopIterator that operates on a copy of the given Collection

    OptionalMap<K,V> - Class in dev.yanianz.star.collections
    This Class functions similar to Map but returns an Optional when calling OptionalMap.get(Object).
    OptionalMap(Supplier) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.OptionalMap
    An OptionalMap allows you to directly obtain Optionals from a Map.

    This is a utility class that allows you to modify data for any Objects that implement PersistentDataHolder.

    R

    randomInfiniteStream() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This method will provide an infinite Stream of elements, randomly drawn from this RandomizedSet.
    RandomizedSet<T> - Class in dev.yanianz.star.collections
    This Class represents a collection of elements.
    RandomizedSet() - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This will initialize a new RandomizedSet with the internal Set being a LinkedHashSet
    RandomizedSet(Collection) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This will initialize a new RandomizedSet with the internal Set being a LinkedHashSet It will be populated with elements from the given Collection, each element will be given a weight of 1.
    RandomizedSet(Supplier) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This will initialize a new RandomizedSet using the given implementation of Set RandomizedSet>String< map = new RandomizedSet><(HashSet::new);

    This removes the data stored with the given key on the given data holder
    remove(T) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.collections.RandomizedSet
    This method will remove the given Item from this Set.
